_source: Curated from a saved LinkedIn webarchive (2026-06). NOT live-fetched — this file is the contract (content tokens / slugs for copy). Edit here; the site renders from these slugs.
name: Robert DeLanghe
headline: I build the security layer for agentic systems.
summary: The machinery that lets software be delivered by agents but governed like infrastructure — capability-based security where every privileged effect is verified against a signed owner. The harder problem, keeping many agent-authored components honest as they evolve, is prx and the bounded-systems libraries.
